description: Deep diagnostic of why VURT paid ads have 82% bounce rate

finding: #1 reason is black video player + age gate on landing. Only 5/10566 sessions start video. 72% leave before Angular hydrates. 63% of paid traffic is non-US.

task: FB/IG in-app browser forensics for paid ads bounce
context: Testing how VURT show pages render in Facebook and Instagram in-app browsers with throttled mobile connections

findings: 5 problems identified: 1) Broken Episode List skeleton renders first for 3-8s, 2) 5MB JS bundle causes 4-14s load times, 3) Mux Player thumbnails broken (black rectangles), 4) 84MB video preload before age gate, 5) Age gate over black screen with no show artwork. Facebook WebView 20-80% slower than Instagram. Autoplay does NOT work in either in-app browser.
